We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.
is now listed on 130+ exchanges and is tradable across 6+ chains, reaching hundreds of millions of users daily. Here’s why that’s important

Today, is listed across global exchanges and apps in nearly every major region! You can find on OpenSea, Binance, Upbit, Coinbase, OKX, Busha, Rain, Revolut, Kraken, Robinhood, Ripio, Mercado Bitcoin, Crypto(dot)com, and many more.

is also tradable cross-chain on ETH, Solana, Abstract, HyperEVM, NEAR, and BNB. OFT is a critical part of this infrastructure, and helps keeps as one unified token that moves across ecosystems without fragmentation.

Our goal is to make accessible wherever people are. From North America to LATAM, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia, continues expanding through exchanges, chains, and platforms that onboard millions of users into crypto every day. Say Hi to my new friend
